{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Skysworn Underlord
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn Underlord]] has a scar high on his left cheek.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
